text.title: Solo-Scale Affiliate Program Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Solo-Scale Affiliate Program end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: pick-platform
step.action: Choose platform with native affiliate support.

step.name: set-cookie-window
step.action: Set 30-90 days based on consideration cycle.

step.name: declare-fraud-rules
step.action: Encode self-referral block, IP rules, refund clawback.

step.name: cap-and-launch
step.action: Set monthly payout cap; publish terms; open program.
